description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with a prominent red gable roof section at the front and a flat-roofed extension at the rear. The front facade is accented by a central entrance with a small porch, flanked by large glass windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. Two tall palm trees are symmetrically placed on either side of the building, enhancing its tropical, resort-like atmosphere. A kidney-shaped swimming pool is situated adjacent to the house, visible from the side and rear views, and a wooden deck or patio area extends from the main entrance. The exterior walls are primarily white, with wood paneling on the flat-roofed section and glass elements throughout. The overall layout suggests a spacious, open-plan interior with modern amenities and outdoor leisure spaces.
description: A modern bungalow with a red gable roof, large glass windows, white walls, and a flat-roofed extension, surrounded by palm trees and a swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red gable roof, central entrance with porch, large glass windows, and two palm trees flanking the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat-roofed extension, a palm tree, and the kidney-shaped swimming pool positioned to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, windowless back wall, the pool in the foreground, and palm trees on either side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the glass-walled extension, wooden deck, and the pool to the left, with palm trees framing the scene.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
